extensionDescription.message: Polish and rewrite selected text with your chosen AI model.

errorMissingSettings.message: API key is missing. Open Settings to configure it.

settingsSubtitle.message: Manage providers, API keys, and rewrite templates.

templatesHelpText.message: Each template has separate Chinese and English prompts. The app automatically uses the one that matches the selected text's language. Edits in the floating panel apply only to the current run; edits here update the saved template.

shortcutsSubtitle.message: Customize shortcuts in Chrome's extension shortcuts page.

templateDefaultText.message: Polish and improve this text while keeping the original meaning.

templateDefaultTextZh.message: 在保持原意的前提下润色并提升这段文本。

templateDefaultTextEn.message: Polish and improve this text while keeping the original meaning.

templateConciseText.message: Rewrite to be concise and clear while preserving the original meaning.

templateConciseTextZh.message: 在保持原意的前提下，将文本改写得更简洁清晰。

templateConciseTextEn.message: Rewrite to be concise and clear while preserving the original meaning.

templateShortTextZh.message: 将文本简写为更短的版本，保留关键信息，必要时用要点呈现。

templateShortTextEn.message: Condense into a short version that keeps key points; use bullet points if helpful.

templateProfessionalText.message: Rewrite in a professional, business-appropriate tone while preserving the original meaning.

templateProfessionalTextZh.message: 在保持原意的前提下，以正式商务语气改写。

templateProfessionalTextEn.message: Rewrite in a professional, business-appropriate tone while preserving the original meaning.

templateFriendlyText.message: Rewrite in a friendly, warm tone while preserving the original meaning.

templateFriendlyTextZh.message: 在保持原意的前提下，以友好、亲切的语气改写。

templateFriendlyTextEn.message: Rewrite in a friendly, warm tone while preserving the original meaning.

templateAcademicText.message: Rewrite in an academic style with formal wording while preserving the original meaning.

templateAcademicTextZh.message: 在保持原意的前提下，以正式的学术风格改写。

templateAcademicTextEn.message: Rewrite in an academic style with formal wording while preserving the original meaning.

templateTranslateTextZh.message: 将文本翻译为自然流畅的英文，保持原意。

templateTranslateTextEn.message: Translate the text to natural, fluent Chinese while preserving the original meaning.

templateTranslateEnText.message: Translate the text to natural, fluent English while preserving the original meaning.

templateTranslateZhText.message: Translate the text to natural, fluent Chinese while preserving the original meaning.

templateExpandText.message: Expand the text with more detail and examples while preserving the original meaning and tone.

templateExpandTextZh.message: 在保持原意和语气的前提下扩展文本，补充更多细节与例子。

templateExpandTextEn.message: Expand the text with more detail and examples while preserving the original meaning and tone.

templatePromptPlaceholder.message: Edit the template prompt for this language

retryInstruction.message: Improve the rewrite further while preserving the original meaning.

promptTextDefault.message: Polish and improve this text while keeping the original meaning.

promptTextConcise.message: Rewrite to be concise and clear while preserving the original meaning.

promptTextProfessional.message: Rewrite in a professional, business-appropriate tone while preserving the original meaning.

promptTextFriendly.message: Rewrite in a friendly, warm tone while preserving the original meaning.

promptTextAcademic.message: Rewrite in an academic style with formal wording while preserving the original meaning.

promptPlaceholder.message: Polish and improve this text while keeping the original meaning

defaultPrompt.message: Polish and improve this text while keeping the original meaning

errorNoSelection.message: No text selected. Highlight some text and try again.

errorClipboardSelection.message: Unable to read the selection from Google Docs. Reselect the text and try again.

errorNoApiKey.message: API key is required for the selected provider.

errorUnknown.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errorNotEditable.message: The selection is not editable. Use Copy instead.

errorMissingHostPermission.message: Missing host permission for {0}. Reload the extension to apply permissions.

errorNetwork.message: Network error. Check your connection or proxy, then try again.

errorEmptyResult.message: No result was returned. Please try again.

errorDocsReplace.message: Unable to replace in Google Docs. The result is copied to clipboard.

errorDocsInsert.message: Unable to insert in Google Docs. The result is copied to clipboard.

replaceNoticeUnsupported.message: Replace/Insert is not supported here. Use Copy to paste the result manually.

statusCopied.message: Copied. You can paste it into your document.

statusFallback.message: Model unavailable in your region. Trying {0} instead...
